real_insight: A single un-restrained input channel during deep architectural work erodes prajñā — what is lost is not the minutes but the discriminative judgment that would have caught the lock-ordering bug three commits earlier. The verse names a structural mechanism (un-restrained sense → un-yoked mind → drawn-along consciousness → eroded judgment) rather than a generic 'be focused' admonition.
objection: The phrase 'discriminative faculty that would have caught the lock-ordering defect' could lapse into wisdom-theater if the analog stopped at the abstract claim. The analog earns it by naming the specific operational mechanism: the engineer was holding a consistency model in working memory across Postgres / Kafka / GitHub Actions; three interruptions in sequence dissolved the model; the reviewer then catches a defect the senior would normally have caught. The 'lock-ordering' specificity is load-bearing — it is the kind of error a senior engineer recognises as the precise class that emerges from interrupted consistency-model loading. The 'wind-boat' metaphor is sharpened by the line 'the wind does not need to be a storm; one un-restrained input stream is enough' — this is a real, named pattern most engineers recognise as the failure of context-switching costs. The falsifiability clause ('an on-call engineer who silences PagerDuty in the name of sense-control has misread the verse entirely') is the kind of disclaimer that a hostile reviewer would force; it is built in. The counter-example correctly distinguishes drift from engagement. Pass — the verse names the prajñā-thief mechanism with sufficient operational specificity to survive senior review.
